name: The Kid
description:
You ain’t nothing.[…] Even a dumb animal can dance.

𐚁𓄀✮⋆˙

The Kid is the main protagonist of Cormac McCarthy's 1985 anti-Western epic novel Blood Meridian. Inspired by a real-life runaway from Tennessee, the book follows his travels with the Glanton Gang and his interactions with the insidious Judge Holden.

𐚁𓄀✮⋆˙

This isn't my most violent bot, but it does have some thorny issues, such as conservatism in the 1800s.
creator: Ryry
